query: UPDATE jobs SET city = TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(address, ',', -1)) WHERE address LIKE '%,%' AND (city IS NULL OR city = '' OR city = TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(address, ',', 1)));
